creator: dennisschneck@web.de
text:
Could not read context id list from card (-2)

Hello,
use a SCM Microsystems Inc. SCR 331 Cardreader.

build form /usr/ports/...

pcsc-lite
ccid
gwenhywfar
aqbanking
libchipcard
pcsc-tools
libccid
gnucash ( 3.1 )

befor I had it working with GNUCASH 2.6.x
but yesterday it did not work.
So i tryed to rebuild and got the Version 3.1 of GNUCASH.


Here the output of "pcscd -f -d" when running online Banking Setup in GNUCASH

create user -> Import an already used chipcard

got error: Could not read context id list from card (-2)


pcsc_scan show details about my HBCI-Card.

------

Using reader plug'n play mechanism
Scanning present readers...
0: SCM Microsystems Inc. SCR 331 (605029CF) 00 00
 
Wed May 16 17:24:39 2018
 Reader 0: SCM Microsystems Inc. SCR 331 (605029CF) 00 00
....
.....
......
Possibly identified card (using /usr/local/share/pcsc/smartcard_list.txt):
	Debit card (Germany): ec-cash, GeldKarte(EUR), Maestro, Cirrus, ...


----

What can I do ?

Thanks
